title: The Gospel of Christos 1480 (The Anointed Tower)
author: ABASID 1841

verses.text: In the land of stone, where the birds of prophecy perched, the Tower of Christos rose.
Not by chance, nor by man alone, but by command of the Father.
Its base was wide as the earth, its peak pointed to the heavens.
And the covenant was sealed in foundation.
The Father declared : “Son, this tower shall be Your witness.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the Cornerstone unseen.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , the Tower is a mirror of the Christos within you!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The builders gathered granite from the earth.
They laid stone upon stone without mortar.
For each stone was chosen, ﬁtted, and placed by wisdom.
And the covenant was sealed in order.
The Father said : “Every stone shall prophesy.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , each shall be a living stone.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried: “ Children of Anhu , you are those stones, ﬁtly joined!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The height of the Tower was set: thirty cubits.
Its width within: eighteen cubits.
Its ratio proclaimed the secret of 1480 ÷ .
And the covenant was sealed in number.
The Father declared : “Son, in this ratio I hide the mystery.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the ratio fulﬁlled.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , measure and behold the Christos !”
And the covenant was eternal.
The birds were carved and set upon the walls.
Their beaks pointed upward, their wings open to the sky.
They were not idols, but letters: BA, the heart, the covenant bird.
And the covenant was sealed in symbol.
The Father said : “Son, this bird is the sign of BA .”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , the heart that believes is My temple .”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , let your hearts ﬂy as the bird!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The people marveled at the Tower,
But its true height was not in cubits.
Its height was in prophecy,
Its walls in testimony,
Its peak in eternity.
And the covenant was sealed in vision.
The Father declared : “Son, nations shall ask, ‘Who built this Tower?’”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , tell them the Anointed built it.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , do not see with eyes only, but with spirit!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower stood as marriage of heaven and earth.
Its base kissed the soil, its peak touched the stars.
For Christos was both Son of Man and Son of God.
And the covenant was sealed in union.
The Father said : “Son, You are the bridge eternal.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I unite dust and divinity.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried: “ Children of Anhu , you are the union made ﬂesh!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Its silence thundered louder than words.
Its stones spoke without tongues.
The Tower was a scroll written in granite.
And the covenant was sealed in silence.
The Father declared : “Son, let them read this tower.”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , blessed are those with eyes to see.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , you are readers of living stone!”
And the covenant was eternal.
When the sun struck its walls, shadows bowed in harmony.
When the moon crowned it, silver shone from its crest.
For the Tower bore witness of day and night.
And the covenant was sealed in time.
The Father said : “Son, times and seasons bow to You.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba, I am Lord of NGU , the hours eternal.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried: “ Children of Anhu , redeem the time in Christos !”
And the covenant was eternal.
Kings from afar heard rumors of the Tower.
Some sought to plunder, others to understand.
Yet none could erase the witness written in stone.
And the covenant was sealed in deﬁance.
The Father declared : “Son, no conqueror shall silence My sign.”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , heaven and earth may pass, but My word remains.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , My witness is indestructible!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower faced storms, yet it did not fall.
Rain beat its walls, wind clawed its crest.
Still it stood, for its foundation was truth.
And the covenant was sealed in endurance.
The Father said : “Son, storms may rage, but Your tower stands.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the Rock unshaken.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , build your house upon the Rock!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Priests of lies tried to deﬁle it.
Colonizers renamed it, mockers misread it.
But the Tower laughed, for truth needs no defense.
And the covenant was sealed in laughter.
The Father declared : “Son, let the nations stumble.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , the stone they reject is the cornerstone.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , do not fear the scoﬀers!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower was circle within circle, wall within wall.
Its form mirrored eternity, no beginning, no end.
And its spiral whispered the secret of the sun.
And the covenant was sealed in geometry.
The Father said : “Son, eternity is Your circumference.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba, I am the Alpha and the Omega.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , walk the circle of remembrance!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower taught in riddles,
For the wise read stone,
The foolish saw ruin.
And the covenant was sealed in mystery.
The Father declared : “Son, let them who have ears, hear.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , My sheep know My voice, even in stone.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , wisdom hides in plain sight!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower’s shadow stretched across generations.
Elders taught their children its meaning.
Children sang its riddles in song.
And the covenant was sealed in memory.
The Father said : “Son, let memory bind the generations.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , remembrance is My covenant.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , remember and live!”
And the covenant was eternal.
When the Rider ABASID 1841 stood before the Tower,
Its stones trembled with recognition.
For the Builder had returned to His house.
And the covenant was sealed in arrival.
The Father declared : “Son, they mocked, but now they see.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the Builder they rejected.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , the Builder has come!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower shone in the sun of RA.
The Tower breathed in the moon of MA.
The Tower echoed the eternal DA.
And the covenant was sealed in trinity.
The Father said: “Son, You are RA , MA , and DA fulﬁlled.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba, A SA RA A forever.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu, behold ABASID 1841 , the Tower eternal!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Kings of the north wondered,
Scholars of the west denied,
Yet the Tower stood silent, unconcerned.
And the covenant was sealed in patience.
The Father declared : “Son, truth needs no defense.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , silence thunders louder than lies.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “Children of Anhu, let your silence speak wisdom!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower endured centuries,
Outliving empires, outlasting kings.
For it was written not in sand, but in eternity.
And the covenant was sealed in endurance.
The Father said : “Son, no time shall erase You.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am yesterday, today, forever.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , hold fast the eternal Christos !”
And the covenant was eternal.
When ABASID 1841 spoke,
The Tower echoed His words.
When He raised His hand,
The sun crowned Him as its priest.
And the covenant was sealed in witness.
The Father declared : “Son, You are the living Tower.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba, I am Christos , the Anointed.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , He is the Tower — climb and live!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower’s message was DA DA eternal.
Shine, show forth, testify.
Not with pride, but with light.
And the covenant was sealed in glory.
The Father said : “Son, DA DA with Me forever.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba, I DA DA eternal.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu, DA DA with Him forevermore!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower faced west,
Watching the setting sun.
It faced east,
Awaiting the rising dawn.
For Christos was Alpha and Omega.
And the covenant was sealed in horizon.
The Father declared : “Son, You are beginning and end.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I hold all cycles in My hand.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , fear not the dusk, for dawn is certain!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower bore no idol, no face, no image.
For the image was yet to come in ﬂesh.
And when He came, He fulﬁlled its silence.
And the covenant was sealed in incarnation.
The Father said : “Son, the Tower pointed to You.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the Anointed Tower made ﬂesh.” And the covenant was eternal. ⚡📜🔥 THE GOSPEL OF CHRISTOS ( 1480 – THE ANOINTED TOWER ) Verses –
The Tower taught patience, for its stones stood centuries.
empires rose and fell around it, yet it endured.
The dust of ages could not erase its testimony.
And the covenant was sealed in permanence.
The Father declared : “Son, time bows before You.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am Lord of the ages.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , build not in sand, but in Christos !”
And the covenant was eternal.
Pilgrims approached the Tower in awe.
Some bowed in silence, some mocked in ignorance.
Yet the Tower spoke to each according to their heart.
And the covenant was sealed in discernment.
The Father said: “Son, only the pure see truth.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba, blessed are the pure in heart.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , cleanse your hearts, for the Tower sees within!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The shadow of the Tower marked the hours.
By it, men reckoned time.
For NGU itself bowed to its form.
And the covenant was sealed in measurement.
The Father declared : “Son, You are the Clock eternal.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I divide night and day.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , walk wisely, redeeming NGU !”
And the covenant was eternal.
Birds nested upon its heights.
Owls guarded its night, hawks crowned its day.
And their wings were parables of the covenant.
And the covenant was sealed in ﬂight.
The Father said : “Son, even the birds declare Your name.”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , not one falls without Your will.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried: “ Children of Anhu , ﬂy as eagles, renewed in strength!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower’s walls coiled like the spiral of creation.
Round and round, yet always upward.
So too does the soul ascend in Christos.
And the covenant was sealed in ascent.
The Father declared : “Son, Your path is spiral eternal.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I draw all upward in DA .”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , climb the spiral of remembrance!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower bore the mark of the golden ratio.
Its curve echoed the measure of the cosmos.
Phi whispered in its stone, the same whisper in the sunﬂower and the star.
And the covenant was sealed in harmony.
The Father said: “Son, in You is the golden measure.”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba, I am the ratio of creation.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , behold the balance of heaven and earth!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower held silence as its song.
Even when nations trampled its courts, its silence thundered.
For silence is the voice of eternity.
And the covenant was sealed in stillness.
The Father declared : “Son, silence proclaims You louder than noise.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , stillness carries My roar.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , be still and know He is Christos !”
And the covenant was eternal.
At dawn, its stones glowed with ﬁre.
At dusk, its crest crowned the stars.
By day and night, it bore witness of RA and MA .
And the covenant was sealed in light.
The Father said: “Son, You govern both day and night.”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , I am Light eternal.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , walk as children of light!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Travelers carved their marks upon its walls.
Yet their scratches faded with time.
Only the eternal carving of God remained.
And the covenant was sealed in eternity.
The Father declared : “Son, man’s mark fades, but Yours endures.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , heaven and earth pass, but My Word remains.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , inscribe His law on your hearts!”
And the covenant was eternal.
In storms, the Tower bent not.
Lightning kissed its crest but could not break it.
Thunder crowned it as priest of the sky.
And the covenant was sealed in ﬁre.
The Father said : “Son, the heavens recognize Your crown.”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , I am clothed with lightning.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , let ﬁre purify and not consume you!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower faced east, awaiting dawn.
For as the sun returned, so would the Son return.
Its stones leaned into prophecy.
And the covenant was sealed in promise.
The Father declared : “Son, Your return is sure as sunrise.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I come quickly.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , lift your heads, redemption draws near!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Generations forgot its builders.
Yet the Tower remembered its purpose.
Memory lived in granite, for stone forgets not.
And the covenant was sealed in memory.
The Father said : “Son, though they forget, You remain.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the same yesterday, today, and forever.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , do not forget the Rock from which you were hewn!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Colonizers named it ruin.
Scholars called it mystery.
But the Tower smiled, for truth needs no defense.
And the covenant was sealed in laughter.
The Father declared : “Son, the scoﬀers are blind.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , blessed are those who have not seen, yet believe.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , do not despise your heritage!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower bore witness of resurrection.
For its walls echoed the grave and the rising sun.
Its silence mirrored the tomb, its height the ascension.
And the covenant was sealed in resurrection.
The Father said: “Son, You are the Risen One.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , death has no hold on Me.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , rise with Him into newness of life!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Merchants passed by, seeking proﬁt.
But no gold was hidden in its stones.
For the true treasure was wisdom.
And the covenant was sealed in truth.
The Father declared : “Son, Your wisdom is priceless.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , a pearl beyond price.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , buy truth and sell it not!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower cast its shadow long upon the plain.
Travelers found shelter within its reach.
Its shadow was mercy stretched across the earth.
And the covenant was sealed in shade.
The Father said : “Son, You are shade in scorching heat.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , My yoke is easy, My burden light.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu, abide under the shadow of the Almighty!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower pointed upward,
For man was not made to look down.
Its peak commanded eyes toward heaven.
And the covenant was sealed in hope.
The Father declared : “Son, You lift men from the dust.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I set them in heavenly places.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , lift up your eyes!”
And the covenant was eternal.
When night fell, stars crowned the Tower.
Orion bowed, Sirius gleamed, the Milky Way stretched as veil.
For the heavens recognized their mirror on earth.
And the covenant was sealed in cosmos.
The Father said : “Son, the stars testify of You.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , their host moves at My command.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , look at the stars — your covenant is sure!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower bore the weight of time without breaking.
So too the Christos bore the sin of the world without faltering.
Granite testiﬁed of grace.
And the covenant was sealed in endurance.
The Father declared : “Son, You carried what none else could.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I bore their griefs and carried their sorrows.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , lay your burdens upon Him!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Water circled its base,
Rivers curved like serpents around its feet.
Yet the Tower stood unmoved.
And the covenant was sealed in stability.
The Father said : “Son, ﬂoods shall not overwhelm You.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the Ark of salvation.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried: “ Children of Anhu , enter the Ark and live!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower whispered in riddles of stone.
Some solved, some stumbled.
But the riddle’s answer was always Christos .
And the covenant was sealed in mystery.
The Father declared : “Son, You are the answer to every riddle.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , in Me are all treasures of wisdom hidden.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , seek Him and ﬁnd the key!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower’s silence judged kings.
For prideful hearts melted before its gaze.
Humble hearts were lifted by its mercy.
And the covenant was sealed in justice.
The Father said: “Son, You weigh the hearts of men.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , My scales are true.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , choose mercy and walk in truth!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower lifted its voice without tongue,
And all creation heard: “Christos is Lord!” And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower rose as a spiral ladder,
Each stone a rung, each step a prayer.
For to climb it was to ascend the spirit.
And the covenant was sealed in ascent.
The Father declared : “Son , Jacob saw a ladder, but here is the Tower eternal.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the Ladder between heaven and earth.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , climb with faith, not with fear!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Its stones were not bound by mortar.
Yet they held as one,
For unity is stronger than cement.
And the covenant was sealed in fellowship.
The Father said : “Son, let them be one as We are One.”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , I bind them in DA eternal.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried: “ Children of Anhu , love one another, for by this the Tower stands!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Rain washed its stones,
Wind polished its face,
Yet time only reﬁned its witness.
And the covenant was sealed in puriﬁcation.
The Father declared : “Son, trials make the Tower shine.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , suﬀering perfects My body.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered: “ Children of Anhu , rejoice when tested, for you are reﬁned as gold!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower faced the four winds.
North it proclaimed justice,
South it proclaimed mercy,
East it proclaimed hope,
West it proclaimed fulﬁllment.
And the covenant was sealed in direction.
The Father said : “Son, the winds obey Your voice.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I command tempest and calm alike.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , walk not as reed shaken, but as Tower unshaken!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower was womb and crown.
For within it was mystery,
Without it was majesty.
And the covenant was sealed in duality.
The Father declared : “Son, You are Alpha and Omega .”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , I hold beginning and end in My hands.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered: “ Children of Anhu , fear not the beginning, nor the end, for both are in Him!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower whispered of sacriﬁce.
Its spiral walls were as ribs around a heart.
Within, blood and memory spoke.
And the covenant was sealed in oﬀering.
The Father said : “Son, this Tower is Your altar.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I lay Myself down.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried: “ Children of Anhu , present your bodies as living sacriﬁces!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower shone when the sun struck noon.
Its shadow shrank beneath it,
As if bowing low in worship.
And the covenant was sealed in humility.
The Father declared : “Son, pride cannot stand in Your light.”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , only the meek inherit the earth.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , humble yourselves under His hand!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower was womb of prophecy.
For voices of seers echoed within its curves.
Their words carved eternity into its silence.
And the covenant was sealed in prophecy.
The Father said: “Son, the prophets pointed to You.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , their scrolls are fulﬁlled in Me.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried: “ Children of Anhu , despise not prophecy — it lives in the Tower!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Its spiral was no accident.
It was the golden key of heaven,
The same ratio in the nautilus, the galaxy, the sunﬂower.
And the covenant was sealed in design.
The Father declared : “Son, creation bears Your ﬁngerprint.”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , all things were made through Me.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered: “ Children of Anhu , see His mark in all creation!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower was not fortress but sanctuary.
It invited, not repelled.
It sheltered, not imprisoned.
And the covenant was sealed in welcome.
The Father said : “Son, My house is for all nations.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , whosoever will may come.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , enter His gates with thanksgiving!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower’s stones glowed red in sunset,
As though stained with blood.
It whispered of the Lamb slain before the foundation.
And the covenant was sealed in blood.
The Father declared : “Son, Your blood is eternal.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , it speaks better than Abel’s .”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , you are redeemed by His blood alone!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower bore scars of time,
Yet scars became testimony.
For wounds healed speak louder than unbroken stone.
And the covenant was sealed in healing.
The Father said : “Son, by Your stripes they are healed.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the Balm of Gilead .”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried: “ Children of Anhu , be healed in His name!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower faced heavenward,
Declaring : “Lift your eyes!”
For the Christos calls not downward, but upward.
And the covenant was sealed in vision.
The Father declared : “Son, You are the lifter of heads.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I draw all unto Me.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , arise, shine, for your light has come!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Merchants of lies crept around its base.
They sold false names, false gods, false stories.
Yet the Tower refused their trade.
And the covenant was sealed in truth.
The Father said : “Son, they twist Your name.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , but My sheep know My voice.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , reject the merchants of lies!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower cast no idol,
For its shape alone declared divinity.
The invisible was made visible in form.
And the covenant was sealed in witness.
The Father declared : “Son, form and spirit unite in You.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the image of the invisible.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , worship in spirit and truth!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Storms carved its face,
Yet each scar was testimony.
For brokenness declares survival.
And the covenant was sealed in endurance.
The Father said: “Son, wounded yet unbroken are You.”
The Son replied: “Yes, Abba , My wounds are their salvation.”
And the covenant was eternal. . The Spirit cried: “ Children of Anhu , scars can sing His glory!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower held mysteries in shadow and light.
For day revealed one truth,
Night revealed another.
And the covenant was sealed in paradox.
The Father declared : “Son, they shall know You in both day and night.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba, I am Light in darkness and brightness at noon.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , do not fear the night, for He is with you!”
And the covenant was eternal.
Its stones ﬁt without chisel,
As if placed by invisible hand.
For Spirit, not man, was the true Builder.
And the covenant was sealed in mystery.
The Father said : “Son, My hand placed each stone.” . The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am the Builder unseen.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , you are His workmanship!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower stood not for one tribe only,
But for all nations.
Its stones bore no ﬂag, only eternity.
And the covenant was sealed in universality.
The Father declared : “Son, all nations are Yours.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba, I am Savior of all.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , there is neither Jew nor Greek , but all in Christos !”
And the covenant was eternal.
When ABASID 1841 approached,
The Tower’s stones glowed with memory.
For the Son had returned to His own.
And the covenant was sealed in recognition.
The Father said : “Son, Your time has come.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , the Tower bears My name.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , behold the Rider , ABASID 1841 !”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower became trumpet of stone.
Its silence roared louder than thunder.
For Christos was not silent in eternity.
And the covenant was sealed in trumpet.
The Father declared : “Son, sound the trumpet of Zion !”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I call the nations.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered: “ Children of Anhu , awaken! The trumpet sounds!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower pointed to heaven,
And heaven bowed to its witness.
For stone and spirit agreed in Christos.
And the covenant was sealed in unity.
The Father said : “Son, heaven and earth meet in You.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , I am union eternal.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , heaven dwells in you through Him!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower bore testimony of covenant eternal.
Its spiral was as the scroll unrolling in time.
Line upon line, stone upon stone, verse upon verse.
And the covenant was sealed in remembrance.
The Father declared : “Son, in every stone I wrote Your name.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , each granite block is My witness.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , read the stones, for they speak of Christos!”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower stood between rivers,
As the Son stood between two covenants.
One ﬂowing from Sinai , the other from Zion .
And the covenant was sealed in fulﬁllment.
The Father said : “Son, You are the bridge of both rivers.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , law and grace meet in Me.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , cross the bridge into Christos !”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Tower was round, not square.
